name: RPlog_Han_s_Admission
title: He's Okay, I Gotta Find Him
summary: Admiral Ackbar, worried by reports that Han Solo has not left his quarters since learning Chewbacca was shot down over Etti IV, calls on the grief-stricken Corellian to find him sleepless and feverishly poring over intelligence reports, insisting against all evidence that his co-pilot survived. Ackbar gently bargains a deal: he will send a ship to scan the Etti system for distress signals if Han will rest, and the exhausted smuggler finally slips into uneasy slumber. Luke arrives soon after and coaxes Han out for food and drinks at the Rusty Urchin Restaurant, where the diplomat Ariana, the young Eddie, and the eavesdropping technician Bec gather around the table. The conversation pries loose painful truths about Grathix's betrayal on Palanhi and the loss of the Millennium Falcon, until Han erupts, blaming himself for both the ship and Chewbacca, and storms out. Luke trails him to the Briny Deep Tap House, where after a bitter argument Han confesses he has been suffering nightmares since his imprisonment, and Luke pledges to help him through them.
